templates.body:
Hi [name],

Quote for [deliverable]:
[line items with amounts]

Assumptions: [what is not included]
Turnaround: [date]
Valid until: [valid_until]
Deposit to start: [deposit_pct]%

Reply ACCEPT to proceed or ask questions here.
Changes after acceptance go through change order (scope may affect price).

TERMS (short)
- Quote valid until [valid_until]
- Deposit [deposit_pct]% to schedule production
- Proof approval required before print/run
- Scope changes: written change order before extra work

Hi [name],

Almost ready to quote. Still need:
1) [missing field]
2) [missing field]

Once I have these I will send numbers within [24h]. No charge for the clarify step.

Hi [name],

Three options for [deliverable]:

A) [tier_a_name] · $[a] · [includes]
B) [tier_b_name] · $[b] · [includes]
C) [tier_c_name] · $[c] · [includes]

Reply A, B, or C and I will confirm timeline and send formal quote.

Rush line item: +$[rush_fee] ([rush_reason])
Base: $[base]
Total with rush: $[total]

Rush only if deposit received by [cutoff_datetime].

Hi [name],

Thanks for thinking of us. We are not the right fit for [reason] on this timeline/budget.

If helpful: [referral name or alternate path]

Wishing you a smooth project.

Hi [name],

Same as [prior_job_id] on [date]?

If yes: $[amount], same specs, turnaround [date].
If anything changed, tell me before I lock this in.

Hi [name],

Your ask now includes [new scope]. Prior quote [old_quote_id] is void.

Updated quote:
[line items]
Valid until: [valid_until]

Extra scope after you accept will be a change order.

templates.use_when: No reply 3 days after quote sent
templates.body:
Hi [name],

Checking if quote [ref] for [deliverable] still works. Valid until [valid_until].

Reply yes, questions, or pass and I will close the file.

Quick confirm before I send numbers:
Your latest message asks for [summary].
Last specs we had: [prior summary].

Which is correct? One reply and I quote same day.
